_docs: Reference for every config.json key, each shown with its default value. Copy ONLY the keys you actually want to change into config.json; any key you omit keeps the default shown here. An empty string for WORKER_NAME / ACCESS_TOKEN means 'use the machine hostname'. For a custom port, TLS, or backup pools, set the native XMRig 'pools' array (shown below) instead of POOL_HOST; blank fields in a pool fall back to Pithead defaults. Full descriptions: https://github.com/p2pool-starter-stack/rigforge/blob/main/docs/configuration.md#configuration-reference
